2026-04-01.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5 with Breakthrough Reasoning Capabilities
2026-04-01.chinese_title: OpenAI发布具有突破性推理能力的GPT-5
2026-04-01.summary: OpenAI today announced GPT-5, the latest version of its large language model with significantly improved reasoning capabilities.

2026-04-02.title: GPT-5 Shows Human-Level Performance on Complex Reasoning Tasks
2026-04-02.chinese_title: GPT-5在复杂推理任务上表现出人类水平性能
2026-04-02.summary: New benchmarks show GPT-5 outperforms previous models on complex reasoning tasks.

2026-04-02.title: OpenAI Releases API Access for GPT-5 for Enterprise Customers
2026-04-02.chinese_title: OpenAI为企业客户发布GPT-5的API访问权限
2026-04-02.summary: Enterprise customers can now access GPT-5 through OpenAI's API platform.

2026-04-02.title: Nvidia Unveils GB200 GPU with 2x Performance of H100
2026-04-02.chinese_title: 英伟达推出性能是H100两倍的GB200 GPU
2026-04-02.summary: Nvidia today announced the GB200, its next-generation GPU designed for AI workloads.

2026-04-02.title: GB200 to Start Shipping in Q3 2026, Pricing Starts at $50,000
2026-04-02.chinese_title: GB200将于2026年第三季度开始出货，起价5万美元
2026-04-02.summary: Nvidia announced pricing and availability for its new GB200 GPU.
